title: Strategen: Stockholmbörsen kommer lyfta ytterligare i höst
summary_md:
# Strategen: Stockholmbörsen kommer lyfta ytterligare i höst

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-25  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode is dominated by a strategist's bullish macro view: oil has normalised to pre-war levels, inflation swaps are falling, and rate-sensitive sectors—especially real estate—are positioned for a bounce as Swedish/European rates finally come down. The strategist sees the Stockholm exchange (up 9% YTD) rising further into autumn, driven by earnings growth (~15% expected for 2026) rather than valuation. Swedish real estate has lagged US peers by a ~30% spread, which is viewed as an unusual, mean-reverting opportunity despite legitimate vacancy concerns.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟠 CAST — Castellum | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Part of the broad bullish real-estate thesis (rates falling, US-vs-Sweden spread mean-reverting), but flagged with ~15% vacancy in a current acquisition.

#### Reasoning

The strategist argues real estate has been the most punished sector on the Iran war/high oil, never regaining its multiple even after oil normalised, because rates lagged. With inflation swaps falling and the macro backdrop shifting, rate-sensitive real estate is positioned for a rebound, narrowing the ~30% gap to US peers. Castellum specifically is cautioned for high single-asset vacancy (~15%), which zeroes revenue on high-margin management income.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Swedish/European rates fail to come down
- if Riksbank/ECB signal further rate hikes
- if vacancy rates rise further across the sector
- if macro data supports inflation/rate-hike narrative

> *"man kan positionera sig för en studs i fastighetsbolagen"*

---
